fields.name: classes
fields.label: Variant & Layout
fields.description: Select variant and optional layout modifiers. Default: state dropdown. Dynamic: state + county. ZIP: ZIP code input. Card: white card with shadow. Centered: centered layout.

fields.name: icon
fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Optional icon image displayed above the heading.

fields.name: heading
fields.label: Heading
fields.description: Heading text. Supports bold/italic formatting for partial emphasis.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Optional introductory text shown above the form.

fields.name: zip-label
fields.label: ZIP Code Input Label
fields.description: Only used in ZIP Code variant.

fields.name: zip-placeholder
fields.label: ZIP Code Placeholder
fields.description: Placeholder text for the ZIP code input (e.g., '00000' or 'Enter a Zip Code').

fields.name: submit-label
fields.label: Submit Button Label
fields.description: Only used in ZIP Code variant.

fields.name: filter-label
fields.label: Filter Dropdown Label
fields.description: Label for optional filter dropdown (e.g., 'Select a filter'). Leave empty to hide.

fields.name: indication-label
fields.label: Indication Label
fields.description: Label for indication radio group (e.g., 'Choose Indication'). Leave empty to hide.

fields.name: api
fields.label: API Endpoint
fields.description: Formulary lookup API URL. Receives ?state=, ?state=&county=, or ?zip= query parameters depending on variant.

fields.name: recaptcha-key
fields.label: reCAPTCHA Site Key
fields.description: Google reCAPTCHA v3 site key. If provided, a token is sent with each API request.

fields.name: results-per-page
fields.label: Results Per Page
fields.description: Number of results displayed per page in the results table.

fields.name: error
fields.value: An error occurred. Please try again.
fields.label: Error Message

fields.name: recaptcha-notice
fields.label: reCAPTCHA Notice Text
fields.description: Legal text shown below the form (e.g., 'This site is protected by reCAPTCHA...').

fields.name: disclaimer
fields.label: Disclaimer Text
fields.description: Coverage disclaimer text shown below the results area.

fields.name: analyticsId
fields.label: Analytics ID
fields.description: Value for data-analytics attribute on the submit/select action.
